BD-22 3573

System / Location · First seen 3301-07-19 · 3 mentions
EDSM ↗ Inara ↗
Active: 3301-07-19 → 3301-07-31
System Overview

BD-22 3573 is a star system in the Elite Dangerous universe, significant from 3301-07-19 to 3301-07-31. Associated with Justice Party, Federal Intelligence Agency, BD-22 3573 Flag. Federal Governor Joel Xander of BD-22 3573 was removed from office and arrested in a surprise Federal Intelligence Agency raid. No official statement was made, but speculation centres on his close relations with local rulers King Justice II of the Justice Party and Supreme Leader Anxo Lino of BD-22 3573 Flag.

System Data
Coordinates: [68.0625, 75.3125, 63.375]
Allegiance: Independent
Government: Corporate
Controlling Faction: Delta Squadron
Security: High
Economy: Agriculture
Population: 9.8B

Mentions Timeline (3 articles)
3301-07-31
Ex Governor Joel Xander Charged with Venality and Abuse of Office
Federal prosecutor Kerstin Marling charged former Governor Joel Xander of BD-22 3573 with venality and abuse of office in Federal court in Rhea. Marling presented evidence that Xander received financial support from local leaders King Justice II and Supreme Leader Anxo Lino, causing a dramatic decrease in Federation popularity in the sector. She emphasised that Xander's corruption was individual criminality, not official Federal policy.
3301-07-23
Victoria Wolf VI and Commodore Stone launch Operation Augeas
Victoria Wolf VI of Wolf 406 Transport Co and Commodore Helena Stone of the Alliance Defence Force launched Operation Augeas to rid BD-22 3573 of criminal elements troubling miners and traders. Bounty bonuses are being paid at Planck Orbital. Stone clarified this is not a military operation as BD-22 3573 does not fall under Alliance jurisdiction; the ADF will observe and only intervene if escalation occurs.
3301-07-19
Governor Joel Xander Removed from Office and Arrested
Federal Governor Joel Xander of BD-22 3573 was removed from office and arrested in a surprise Federal Intelligence Agency raid. Xander and his family were escorted off-planet. No official statement was made, but speculation centres on his close relations with local rulers King Justice II of the Justice Party and Supreme Leader Anxo Lino of BD-22 3573 Flag.
